area.source: Range-derived interpretation of the three-tank design PDF
area.source_locator: 三级水箱加热系统.pdf page 1 gives 15-20 L and 0.4-0.5 m per small tank; pages 2-7 make Tank 3 the buffer replacing the former 60-80 L reservoir
area.description: Constant equivalent areas selected so 0.40 m represents 16 L in Tank 1/Tank 2 and 60 L in Tank 3. The source configurations conflict, so field level-volume calibration remains required.

height_max.source_locator: 三级水箱加热系统.pdf page 1 states 0.4-0.5 m per tank; the retrofit drawing states that all dimensions are reference-only
height_max.description: Provisional upper effective liquid height chosen at the top of the PDF reference range; Tank 3 applicability still requires field confirmation.

cv_interstage.source_locator: No V12 or V23 flow test, valve curve, or discharge coefficient is bundled
cv_interstage.description: Provisional Torricelli coefficients for V12 and V23. The PDF supports gravity flow but not these numerical values.

overflow_level.source_locator: The PDF specifies Tank 1/Tank 2 standpipe returns to Tank 3 but gives no standpipe crest elevations
overflow_level.description: Temporary overflow onset at 96% of the revised 0.50 m hard height; the PDF gives no standpipe crest setting.

cv_overflow.source_locator: No standpipe diameter, discharge test, or overflow routing loss data is bundled
cv_overflow.description: Temporary overflow coefficients set to twice the legacy interstage coefficient for software safety testing only.

overflow_head_floor.source_locator: Inactive-overflow square-root derivative guard for CasADi NLP construction
overflow_head_floor.description: Used only inside the gated square root; inactive overflow remains exactly zero in both numeric and CasADi backends.

high_level_trip.source_locator: The PDF identifies high-level switches and a hardwired L3 interlock but gives no switch settings
high_level_trip.description: Temporary Tank 1/Tank 2 trip at 90% of the revised 0.50 m hard height and below the passive standpipe crest; not a certified protection setting.

ua_loss.source_locator: No cooldown test or insulation specification is included in the retrofit PDF
ua_loss.description: Per-tank ambient heat-loss conductances. Separate values allow the acrylic and stainless-steel vessels to be identified later.

heater_power.source_locator: 三级水箱加热系统.pdf, drawing and Tank 1/heating sections on pages 2, 4, and 7
heater_power.description: One top-inserted 2 kW immersion heater H1 on Tank 1. Tank 2 is reserved only and Tank 3 is unheated.

pump_flow_max.source_locator: The PDF identifies existing P101 but provides no pump curve or rated flow
pump_flow_max.description: Temporary normalized P101 maximum flow pending VFD frequency-flow and system-head tests.

pump_power_max.source: PDF pump-power reference range with retrofit budget cross-check
pump_power_max.source_locator: 三级水箱加热系统.pdf page 1 gives 0.37-0.75 kW pump power; pages 5 and 7 give approximately 0.5 kW for pump/electronics combined
pump_power_max.description: Provisional 500 W benchmark inside the PDF pump range, not a P101 nameplate value; the retrofit 0.5 kW figure also includes electronics.

t_amb.source_locator: No laboratory ambient design condition is specified by the PDF
t_amb.description: Default ambient temperature for the lumped heat-loss model.

h_floor.description: Numerical volume floor only; it is not a residual-volume or sensor-limit claim.

pump_min_level.source_locator: The PDF requires Tank 3 low-level pump protection but does not give the LSL setting
pump_min_level.description: Temporary P101 dry-run cutoff pending the LSL device setting and pump submergence requirement.

heater_min_level.source_locator: The PDF requires an H1 dry-fire interlock but does not give the LSL setting
heater_min_level.description: Temporary Tank 1 heater cutoff pending immersion depth and LSL documentation.

temperature_trip.source_locator: The PDF requires a hardwired over-temperature interlock but does not specify its setting
temperature_trip.description: Software representation of the unspecified L4 trip; not a certified protection setting.

temperature_hard_limit.source_locator: The PDF gives no hard temperature limit and the model excludes boiling
temperature_hard_limit.description: Simulation termination boundary for an atmospheric-water abstraction, not an equipment rating.

references.title: 三级水箱系统升级布置图（阶梯式方案）及三级水箱加热系统说明
references.limitations: 方案讨论用设备布置图，非最终施工图；尺寸为参考值，现有设备数据仍需现场核验

validity_domain.evidence_limit: Loop topology and the 2 kW Tank 1 heater are design-specified. Geometry and pump power are range-informed interpretations across conflicting proposal versions; valve coefficients, pump flow, heat loss, and protection settings remain unverified.
assumptions: closed liquid inventory with no normal product withdrawal or makeup stream
three constant-area perfectly mixed tanks with independent provisional geometry and UA
P101 transfers Tank 3 liquid and enthalpy directly to Tank 1
V12 and V23 follow one-way Torricelli flow without downstream backpressure
instantaneous normalized pump, valve, heater, and sensor response
Tank 1 and Tank 2 passive overflows return mass and enthalpy to Tank 3 using provisional Torricelli coefficients
